title: Señor Nukem (Soccer Round 3 with Qw3rtium)
description:
Back again, bitches!

Sure took a while to get this done. Had some technical difficulties and IRL-stuff that slowed me down. But delay mainly due to laziness. Almost lost all hope while doing this, but I finished it DAMN IT! Hope you enjoy it! :P

And BTW, the solo is kick-ass!


Video: Beavis & Butthead: No laughing
Music: Duke Nukem II, Level 5


And merry Christmas!
